channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: After the Kars4Kids ad is banned in California, we check in on nostalgic jingles past
item.description: A California judge has given Kars4Kids 30 days to either take its ads off the air or update them to disclose its affiliations to a Jewish charity based in the Northeast.
item.content:encoded: A California judge has given Kars4Kids 30 days to either take its ads off the air or update them to disclose its affiliations to a Jewish charity based in the Northeast.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: The Justice Department gives Trump an unprecedented settlement
item.description: D.O.J. gave Trump and his family immunity from tax audits and set up a $1.8 billion fund for victims of "government weaponization." Former government lawyer Andrew Weissmann explains the settlement.
item.content:encoded: D.O.J. gave Trump and his family immunity from tax audits and set up a $1.8 billion fund for victims of "government weaponization." Former government lawyer Andrew Weissmann explains the settlement.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gross

item.title: Having trouble focusing on your book? Try immersive reading
item.description: Reading text of a book while listening to the audiobook is gaining steam among online book communities.
item.content:encoded: Reading text of a book while listening to the audiobook is gaining steam among online book communities.
item.dc:creator: Chloee Weiner

item.title: Every season of 'Survivor,' ranked worst to best, by NPR's resident superfan
item.description: Survivor is a sport, a metaphor for society and yes, entertainment. As its 50th season ends, NPR critic Stephen Thompson ranked every season so far.
item.content:encoded: Survivor is a sport, a metaphor for society and yes, entertainment. As its 50th season ends, NPR critic Stephen Thompson ranked every season so far.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Thompson

item.title: This year's list of endangered historic places focuses on equality and erasure
item.description: Eleven historically significant sites across the country will receive $25,000 from the National Trust for Historic Preservation to commemorate the country's 250th anniversary.
item.content:encoded:
Eleven historically significant sites across the country will receive $25,000 from the National Trust for Historic Preservation to commemorate the country's 250th anniversary.

(Image credit: Whitney Browne, National Parks Conservation Association)
item.dc:creator: Neda Ulaby

item.title: 'Taiwan Travelogue' wins the 2026 International Booker Prize
item.description: The novel is the first work translated from Mandarin Chinese to win the award, which celebrates its 10th anniversary this year.
item.content:encoded:
The novel is the first work translated from Mandarin Chinese to win the award, which celebrates its 10th anniversary this year.

(Image credit: Adrian Dennis)
item.dc:creator: Ivy Buck

item.title: Tomeka Reid expands the possibilities of jazz avant garde on 'Dance! Skip! Hop!'
item.description: Reid's quartet makes music that seems inspired by a variety of sources, ranging from modern dance to children's games. Her latest album is one of her most compelling.
item.content:encoded: Reid's quartet makes music that seems inspired by a variety of sources, ranging from modern dance to children's games. Her latest album is one of her most compelling.
item.dc:creator: Martin Johnson

item.title: In the face of devastating loss, Jesmyn Ward holds onto 'respair'
item.description: Ward learned the term "respair" — meaning the recovery of hope after despair — during the pandemic. Her new book On Witness and Respair is an essay collection on grief, motherhood and survival.
item.content:encoded:
Ward learned the term "respair" — meaning the recovery of hope after despair — during the pandemic. Her new book On Witness and Respair is an essay collection on grief, motherhood and survival.

(Image credit: Beowulf Sheehan)
item.dc:creator: Tonya Mosley

item.title: 15 books our critics can't wait for this summer
item.description: A gothic horror tale, a creepy science-fiction romp, a sweeping romance, an intergenerational saga, a book about birds — here are the fiction and nonfiction our critics are most looking forward to.
item.content:encoded: A gothic horror tale, a creepy science-fiction romp, a sweeping romance, an intergenerational saga, a book about birds — here are the fiction and nonfiction our critics are most looking forward to.
item.dc:creator: Meghan Collins Sullivan

item.title: Bruce Springsteen voices what Colbert left unsaid on penultimate 'Late Show'
item.description: The rock icon directly blamed President Trump and the Ellisons for Colbert's cancellation on Wednesday night's show.
item.content:encoded:
The Late Show with Stephen Colbert to perform "Streets of Minneapolis."'/>

The rock icon directly blamed President Trump and the Ellisons for Colbert's cancellation on Wednesday night's show.

(Image credit: Scott Kowalchyk)
item.dc:creator: Eric Deggans
